channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Big banks report blowout profits: Live updates
item.description: The five banks releasing earnings Tuesday morning have reported strong revenue from equities trading.

item.title: Warren Buffett excludes Gates Foundation from his annual donations of Berkshire stock
item.description: Warren Buffett omitted the Gates Foundation from his annual charitable stock gifts.

item.title: IBM shares skid more than 20% after company warns second-quarter earnings fell short of expectations
item.description: CEO blamed the shortfall on weakness in the software and infrastructure business because clients shifted money toward hardware purchases.

item.title: Global shipping industry sounds the alarm over Trump’s Hormuz toll plan
item.description: For shipping giant Hapag-Lloyd, it is "fundamentally wrong" to charge tolls for passage through international waters, regardless of the country in charge.

item.title: This trucking stock has doubled in 2026. BMO says it has more room to run
item.description: RXO's shares are likely to advance as the company notches strong earnings amid a tightening trucking market, per BMO Capital Markets.

item.title: Inflation reports expected to show improvement with a caveat; Warsh heads to Capitol Hill
item.description: Tumbling oil prices in June are likely to provide some welcome good news for inflation.

item.title: TikTok policy chief defends safety measures amid EU push to limit children's social media access
item.description: TikTok's policy chief defended the platform's safety measures as the European Union pushes ahead with restricting children's access to social media.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: JPMorgan Chase, Bank of America, IBM, Apple & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in early trading.

item.title: Taiwan's second-largest chipmaker starts mass production in Singapore; Citi sees improving outlook
item.description: Taiwan’s UMC has kicked off mass production of silicon photonics wafers at its Singapore facility amid positive Citi forecast.

item.title: A French underwear brand is taking on fast fashion — with an IPO
item.description: Le Slip Français will make its stock market debut in Paris on Tuesday, betting that consumers will pay for locally made clothing amid competition from Shein.

item.title: World Cup's biggest spenders show up late as semifinals drive host city travel boom
item.description: World Cup travel demand to U.S. host cities is spiking as the tournament reaches the semifinal stage.

item.title: Business declares war on Pentagon stock buyback, dividend restrictions moving in Senate
item.description: The provision was pushed by Sen. Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass., and was included in the National Defense Authorization Act on a bipartisan basis.

item.title: HSBC loses conviction in leading drugmaker, forecasts 'tough path' ahead
item.description: The bank's analysts wrote in a note on Monday that they have downgraded the stock to 'hold', as the team "no longer finds the risk-reward balance attractive."

item.title: Retail-trader 'bottleneck bros' eyeing AI supply chain can't wait for SK Hynix options
item.description: For many of those retail tech traders, SK Hynix's memory business reminds them of Micron – the paragon of the supply-chain bottleneck thesis.

item.title: Jim Cramer says these 'Pavlovian trades' are the stocks that benefit when oil spikes
item.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer said investors have gravitated toward a familiar group of stocks as oil prices climb.

item.title: Trump to claim declassified intel reveals 2020 election interference: MS NOW
item.description: Trump said he will make a "Speech to the Nation on Thursday evening, at 9 P.M. Eastern," without providing further details.

item.title: 'Nobody underwrote for that': Private credit faces a key test as higher rates squeeze borrowers
item.description: Private credit is facing a new pressure point from elevated rates, which could hit under-pressure borrowers.

item.title: Is Hormuz open? Trump's toll threat intensifies rush to bypass the Strait altogether
item.description: Gulf producers are increasingly relying on alternative routes to keep crude moving as shipping disruptions expose the risks of depending on the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: South Carolina governor taps Lindsey Graham's sister to serve as interim senator
item.description: The death of Sen. Lindsey Graham ignited a scramble among South Carolina Republicans to prepare for a special primary election to replace him on the GOP ticket.

item.title: A toxic stew drags stocks lower as we look at what can get the AI trade back on track
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: Judge says Trump sued IRS for 'improper purpose'; refers his lawyer to bar
item.description: Trump's lawsuit against the IRS was settled by the Justice Department with an agreement to create a $1.8 billion "lawfare" fund that has since been scrapped.

item.title: Are rewards debit cards the new credit cards? A brief history and the best options to consider
item.description: Rewards debit cards can help you earn cash back without borrowing money. Here’s what to know about their history and the top options available today.

item.title: SpaceX shares are struggling. Evercore ISI still says it's 'too compelling to ignore'
item.description: SpaceX has a number of projects in its pipeline that have fueled the Street's confidence in its stock, making it a buy, per Evercore ISI.

item.title: 3 things you need to know about cyclospora
item.description: Cyclospora, a parasitic infection that can cause weeks of severe diarrhea, is spreading in the U.S. Here's what to know about the disease, and how to stay safe.

item.title: U.S. crude jumps above $80 as Iran ceasefire fractures; Trump's Hormuz toll plans reignite supply fears
item.description: Oil prices rose on Tuesday after U.S. President Donald Trump announced plans to impose shipping fees in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Trump administration urges banks to scrutinize lending to immigrants without work authorization
item.description: Federal bank regulators issued guidance Monday seeking to curb mortgages, auto loans and other consumer credit to immigrants without U.S. work authorization.

item.title: Treasury yields rise as Fed rate hike expectations grow ahead of June inflation print
item.description: Treasury yields increased Tuesday as expectations for more Federal Reserve interest rate hikes grow.

item.title: Paramount, WBD hit with lawsuit from 12 states, including California, to block merger
item.description: A group of states, including California, filed a lawsuit to block the merger between Paramount and Warner Bros. Discovery.

item.title: Chipotle is opening its first restaurant in Mexico
item.description: Fast casual chain Chipotle announced Monday that it is opening its first location in Mexico in the Monterrey area.

item.title: U.S. targets Iranian military assets in another round of strikes as Tehran hits Gulf states
item.description: The U.S. has completed a third consecutive night of strikes against Iran, as Tehran targets U.S. military facilities in the region.
